name: Microsoft 365
description: Read mail, calendars, and chats, and opt in to narrowly scoped Microsoft Graph writes.

capabilities.description: Search and read mail. No send, edit, move, or delete access.
Create unsent mail drafts. Cannot send, move, or delete mail.
Read calendar events. No create, edit, or delete access.
Create or edit calendar events. Cannot delete events or respond to invitations.
List chats and read bounded message history. Cannot create, edit, or delete chats or messages.
Send a plain-text message to an existing chat. Cannot create chats or edit or delete messages.

tools.name: microsoft365.mail.search
tools.description: Search recent Microsoft 365 mail with a bounded read-only query.

tools.name: microsoft365.mail.draft.create
tools.description: Create one unsent Microsoft 365 mail draft with a plain-text body and optional file attachments.

tools.name: microsoft365.mail.attachments.list
tools.description: List attachments on one Microsoft 365 mail message.

tools.name: microsoft365.mail.attachment.get
tools.description: Read one attachment from one Microsoft 365 mail message within a 5 MB response.

tools.name: microsoft365.calendar.events
tools.description: Read Microsoft 365 calendar events in a bounded date range.

tools.name: microsoft365.calendar.event.attachments.list
tools.description: List attachments on one Microsoft 365 calendar event.

tools.name: microsoft365.calendar.event.attachment.get
tools.description: Read one attachment from one Microsoft 365 calendar event within a 5 MB response.

tools.name: microsoft365.calendar.event.update
tools.description: Edit the subject, time, location, or attendee list on one Microsoft 365 calendar event.

tools.name: microsoft365.chat.list
tools.description: List a bounded number of the user's Microsoft 365 chats.

tools.name: microsoft365.chat.messages
tools.description: Read a bounded number of messages from one Microsoft 365 chat.

tools.name: microsoft365.chat.message.send
tools.description: Send one plain-text message to an existing Microsoft 365 chat.

skills.name: outlook-mail
skills.description: Search Outlook mail or create an unsent draft through TritonAI Harness. Use when the user asks to review, search, or triage Outlook mail, or to prepare an email draft without sending it.

skills.name: outlook-calendar
skills.description: Read, create, or edit Outlook calendar events through TritonAI Harness. Use when the user asks about their Outlook schedule or requests a new or changed calendar event.

skills.name: teams-chat
skills.description: Read Microsoft Teams chats or send a message to an existing chat through TritonAI Harness. Use when the user asks to review Teams chats, read chat history, or send a chat reply.
